languages.text: {n}Говорящая мгновенно прерывает передачу и разворачивается к вам. Сверкнув глазами, Ювенна фон Валанциус дарит вам яркую и хищную улыбку, лишенную даже намека на теплоту.{/n} "Нельзя сказать, что я не ждала этой встречи".
languages.translation_comment:
Стартуем DL_ConspiratorsCouncil и DL_TraitorsConspiracy
телепортируемся в уединенное место во внутреннем дворе и стартуем DL_JuvennaConspiracyDiscussion_dialogue
DL_SpysFirstMeet

DL_SpysFirstMeet

languages.text: {n}She instantly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you. Her eyes glinting, Juvenna von Valancius gives you a bright and bloodthirsty smile, devoid of even a hint of warmth.{/n} "I cannot deny that I have been looking forward to this meeting."
languages.original_text: {n}Говорящая мгновенно прерывает передачу и разворачивается к вам. Сверкнув глазами, Ювенна фон Валанциус дарит вам яркую и хищную улыбку, лишенную даже намека на теплоту.{/n} "Нельзя сказать, что я не ждала этой встречи".

traits.locale_text: {n}She instantly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you. Her eyes glinting, Juvenna von Valancius gives you a bright and bloodthirsty smile, devoid of even a hint of warmth.{/n} "I cannot deny that I have been looking forward to this meeting."

{n}She instantly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you. Her eyes glinting, Juvenna von Valancius gives you a bright and bloodthirsty smile, devoid of even a hint of warmth.{/n} "I cannot deny that I have been looking forward to this meeting."

{n}She instantly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you. Her eyes glinting, Juvenna von Valancius gives you a bright and bloodthirsty smile, devoid of even a hint of warmth.{/n} "I cannot deny that I have been looking forward to this meeting."

languages.text: {n}Juvenna von Valancius corta la transmisión y se gira hacia ti. Con los ojos relucientes, te dedica una sonrisa espléndida y sanguinaria, carente de la más ínfima calidez.{/n} «No puedo decir que no ansiara esta conversación».
languages.original_text: {n}She instantly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you. Her eyes glinting, Juvenna von Valancius gives you a bright and bloodthirsty smile, devoid of even a hint of warmth.{/n} "I cannot deny that I have been looking forward to this meeting."

traits.locale_text: {n}Juvenna von Valancius corta la transmisión y se gira hacia ti. Con los ojos relucientes, te dedica una sonrisa espléndida y sanguinaria, carente de la más ínfima calidez.{/n} «No puedo decir que no ansiara esta conversación».

languages.text: {n}她立刻切断通讯，转过身来。尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯目光闪烁，露出一个明亮却毫无温度、甚至带着嗜血意味的笑容。{/n}“我一直期待着这次会面。”
languages.original_text: {n}She instantly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you. Her eyes glinting, Juvenna von Valancius gives you a bright and bloodthirsty smile, devoid of even a hint of warmth.{/n} "I cannot deny that I have been looking forward to this meeting."

traits.locale_text: {n}她立刻切断通讯，转过身来。尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯目光闪烁，露出一个明亮却毫无温度、甚至带着嗜血意味的笑容。{/n}“我一直期待着这次会面。”

languages.text: {n}Elle coupe aussitôt la communication et se tourne vers vous. Les yeux brillants, Juvenna von Valancius vous adresse un sourire carnassier, dépourvu de la moindre trace de chaleur.{/n} « Je dois admettre que j'étais impatiente de vous rencontrer. »
languages.original_text: {n}She instantly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you. Her eyes glinting, Juvenna von Valancius gives you a bright and bloodthirsty smile, devoid of even a hint of warmth.{/n} "I cannot deny that I have been looking forward to this meeting."

traits.locale_text: {n}Elle coupe aussitôt la communication et se tourne vers vous. Les yeux brillants, Juvenna von Valancius vous adresse un sourire carnassier, dépourvu de la moindre trace de chaleur.{/n} « Je dois admettre que j'étais impatiente de vous rencontrer. »

languages.text: {n}Yayını anında kesiyor ve sana doğru dönüyor. Gözleri parlayan Juvenna von Valancius, içinde zerre sıcaklık barındırmayan parlak ve kana susamış bir gülümseme bahşediyor.{/n} "Bu karşılaşmayı dört gözle beklediğimi inkâr edemem."
languages.original_text: {n}She instantly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you. Her eyes glinting, Juvenna von Valancius gives you a bright and bloodthirsty smile, devoid of even a hint of warmth.{/n} "I cannot deny that I have been looking forward to this meeting."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yayını anında kesiyor ve sana doğru dönüyor. Gözleri parlayan Juvenna von Valancius, içinde zerre sıcaklık barındırmayan parlak ve kana susamış bir gülümseme bahşediyor.{/n} "Bu karşılaşmayı dört gözle beklediğimi inkâr edemem."

languages.text: {n}Sie beendet umgehend die Übertragung und wendet sich dir zu. Juvenna von Valancius schenkt dir mit funkelnden Augen ein gleichermaßen strahlendes wie blutrünstiges Lächeln, dem jede Wärme fehlt.{/n} "Ich kann nicht bestreiten, dass ich mich lange auf dieses Treffen gefreut habe."
languages.original_text: {n}She instantly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you. Her eyes glinting, Juvenna von Valancius gives you a bright and bloodthirsty smile, devoid of even a hint of warmth.{/n} "I cannot deny that I have been looking forward to this meeting."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sie beendet umgehend die Übertragung und wendet sich dir zu. Juvenna von Valancius schenkt dir mit funkelnden Augen ein gleichermaßen strahlendes wie blutrünstiges Lächeln, dem jede Wärme fehlt.{/n} "Ich kann nicht bestreiten, dass ich mich lange auf dieses Treffen gefreut habe."

languages.text: {n}彼女は瞬時に通信を遮断し、あなたの方を向く。鋭い光を放つ彼女の瞳は、温かさを欠いた血に飢えた笑顔を浮かべている。ジュベナ・フォン・ヴァランシスは、あなたにこう告げた。「この出会いを楽しみにしていたことは否定できません」{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}She instantly cuts off the transmission and turns toward you. Her eyes glinting, Juvenna von Valancius gives you a bright and bloodthirsty smile, devoid of even a hint of warmth.{/n} "I cannot deny that I have been looking forward to this meeting."

traits.locale_text: {n}彼女は瞬時に通信を遮断し、あなたの方を向く。鋭い光を放つ彼女の瞳は、温かさを欠いた血に飢えた笑顔を浮かべている。ジュベナ・フォン・ヴァランシスは、あなたにこう告げた。「この出会いを楽しみにしていたことは否定できません」{/n}
